summary: LitHaven - A modern, scalable digital marketplace and literary community platform combining an online bookstore (e-commerce for physical/eBooks), article/report publishing section, book review community, and social interaction features (react, comment, follow, share). Target audience: students, researchers, independent writers, academic readers, and book lovers.
architectural_notes: Scalable backend architecture required for e-commerce and social features
Database structure: Users, Books, Articles, Reviews, Comments, Transactions
Cloud storage integration for PDF/EPUB book files
Payment gateway integration for secure checkout
imageRequirements:
## Edit Images
- Re-render with warm brown tones and improved contrast so the open book illustration and 'Lit-Heaven' text are clearly visible on both light and dark backgrounds (Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_152956_0000-removebg-preview.png > lit-heaven-logo-new.dim_400x400.png)

existing_features.title: Build a book listing page with search and filtering capabilities by genre, author, price range, popularity, and rating
Create individual book detail pages displaying cover image, title, author, description, price, genre, ratings summary, reviews list, and add to cart button
Implement a shopping cart system with add/remove functionality and a wishlist feature for saving books
Build a secure checkout system with order processing

Create an articles and reports publishing system where users can publish literary articles, research reports, essays, and opinion pieces with a rich text editor supporting bold, italic, headings, and citations

Create a user system with four roles (Reader, Writer, Author, Admin) and user profiles including profile picture, bio, posted articles, posted reviews, published books (if author), and followers/following system
Implement social features including nested comment system, notification system, follow users feature, trending posts section, and recommended books based on user interests
Build an admin dashboard with features to manage users, approve/reject book uploads, moderate content and comments, remove inappropriate content, and view sales and engagement analytics
Design a clean, elegant, reader-focused UI with a warm literary color palette using cream, brown, and soft black tones, serif typography for book titles, minimalist layout, and dark mode option
Ensure the platform is fully responsive with mobile-first design approach
Update the application name from 'LitHaven' to 'Lit~Heaven' across all frontend components, including Navigation component, HTML title tag, and any other locations where the app name is displayed

Replace the current logo in the Navigation component with the uploaded logo image (Brown Retro Book Store Logo_20260224_150159_0000.png), ensuring proper sizing and responsive behavior across desktop and mobile viewports

Replace the logo image in the Navigation component with the newly uploaded logo file (Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_150159_0000-removebg-preview.png), ensuring it displays consistently across all pages where Navigation is rendered
Verify that all other locations in the application where the logo may appear (such as Footer, authentication pages, modals, or any other components) are updated to use the new logo image

Replace the current logo image (Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_150159_0000-removebg-preview.png) in the Navigation component with a new, more visible logo image that has better contrast and visibility
Update the favicon reference in frontend/index.html to use the new, more visible logo image
Update any logo references in the BooksPage hero banner to use the new, more visible logo image

Replace the current logo image (lit-heaven-logo-visible.dim_400x400.png) in the Navigation component with the newly uploaded logo file (Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_152956_0000-removebg-preview.png), saved as a new asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/. Ensure proper sizing and responsive behavior across desktop and mobile viewports.

Update the favicon reference in frontend/index.html to use the newly uploaded logo image (Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_152956_0000-removebg-preview.png) stored under frontend/public/assets/generated/.
Update the BooksPage hero banner to use the newly uploaded logo image (Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_152956_0000-removebg-preview.png) wherever the previous logo was referenced.

new_feature_requests.summary: Online bookstore with book upload, cover/title/author/description/price/genre/category, ratings/reviews, add to cart, wishlist, secure checkout
Search and filtering by genre, author, price, popularity, rating
Articles & reports section with rich text editor, category/tag system, featured articles, view counter, like/comment/share
Book review community with detailed reviews, 1-5 star ratings, spoiler toggle, reactions (like/insightful/recommend), comments, follow reviewers
User system with roles (Reader, Writer, Author, Admin), profile with picture/bio/articles/reviews/books, followers/following
Social features: reaction system, nested comments, notifications, follow users, trending posts, book recommendations
Admin dashboard: manage users, approve/reject uploads, moderate content, sales/engagement analytics
Clean, elegant, reader-focused UI with warm literary color palette, serif typography, minimalist layout, dark mode, mobile-responsive
Secure authentication (email + OAuth), payment gateway, cloud storage for books, scalable backend

Create a book catalog system where authors and publishers can upload books with metadata including cover image, title, author name, description, price, genre/category, and support for both physical books and eBooks (PDF/EPUB file types)
Implement a category and tag system for articles with a featured articles section, view counter, and like/comment/share functionality
Build a dedicated book review community system where users can post detailed reviews with 1-5 star ratings and a spoiler toggle option
Implement a reaction system for reviews allowing users to react with like, insightful, and recommend, plus a comment system and ability to follow reviewers
Implement secure authentication system supporting email-based login through Internet Identity
Replace the current logo with a new, more visible version

Audit all other frontend components (Footer, ProfileSetupModal, authentication pages, and any remaining components) for references to the old logo (lit-heaven-logo-visible.dim_400x400.png) and update each to use the newly uploaded logo image.
